name: filemover
description: Move or copy selected Finder items to favorites, recents, or custom folders.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: filemover
commands.title: Move Files
commands.description: Move or copy currently selected Finder items to a specific directory.

title: File Mover
author: robinwerner
